sglang.title: [AMD] Fail gracefully when AITER is unavailable gfx90a GPUs
sglang.author: haohui
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Currently sglang fails to start on AMD MI2xx series GPUs because AITER does not support MI2xx series GPUs. SGLang  can simply disable AITER-related optimizations and continue to work on the MI2xx GPUs
Modifications

Harden the checks on when to enable the AITER kernels. The code paths re

sglang.title: feat: support DeepSeek-R1-W4AFP8 model with ep-moe mode
sglang.author: yangsijia-celina
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR supports running DeepSeek-R1-W4AFP8 model with ep-moe mode(deepep mode support is on the way~)
Due to the reduced space required for model weights and decreased bandwidth usage, DeepSeek R1 models can now be run on a single H2O or H100, leading to improved throughput and latency.

vllm.title: [XPU][CI] add v1/core test in xpu hardware ci
vllm.author: Liangliang-Ma
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds V1/core in XPU hardware CI for basic validation of vllm core functionality.
After this we will keep adding more support for xpu and increase CI scope.

vllm.title: [Kernel] Optimize Prefill Attention in Unified Triton Attention Kernel
vllm.author: jvlunteren
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR introduces an optimization to the unified triton attention kernel (#16828 and #19152) that enhances prefill attention performance. The key improvement involves reducing the number of tiles processed during the prefill phase by leveraging the causal mask to skip unnecessary computations. This

vllm.title: [Misc] Add fully interleaved support for multimodal 'string' content format
vllm.author: Dekakhrone
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Current approach stacks all image tokens at the beginning of the prompt for the 'string' chat template content format, which may negatively affect the performance of some models. This PR introduces an option to enable fully interleaved support for such prompts.
FIX #12885

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Maverick correctness by filling zero to cache space in cutlass_moe
vllm.author: minosfuture
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
#19667 changed the workspace creation from torch.zeros to torch.empty. This ends up causing correctness for models using cutlass_moe, e.g. Maverick in our test case. This PR fixes the correctness issue by explicitly filling zeros in cutlass_moe.
Test Plan

added ut that would fail wi

vllm.title: Make distinct `code` and `console` admonitions so readers are less likely to miss them
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adds two new admonition types:

code
console

They have the colours of the question admonition (which we do not use) and each have their own icon.
This was done so that they are visually disinct from the default note admonition so users are more likely to notice them. It was noted in #19926 (comment

vllm.title: [TPU] Temporary fix vmem oom for long model len by reducing page size
vllm.author: Chenyaaang
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This pr temporarily fixes vmem oom before a permanent fix to reduce VREG spill.  When max-model-len is very long (for example, Llama70b, 32k tokens), we sometimes experience VMEM OOM because VREG spill take too much memory.

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Tensorizer and S3Model loading integrated, updated tensorizer==2.10.1, support passing all TensorSerializer and TensorDeserializer params
Supersedes the closed #19616 with fixed signed-off commits.

Integrates Tensorizer loading in to the S3Model machinery. It now seamles
